description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the jangrewe/gitlab-ci-android Docker image. Set a CI_PROJECT_NAME variable to Flasher, define a cache keyed by CI_PROJECT_ID that stores the .gradle/ directory, and add a before_script that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository .gradle folder and makes gradlew executable. Define a single stage called build and a buildRelease job in that stage that runs only on the master branch, executes ./gradlew assembleRelease, and publishes the generated APKs from build/outputs/apk/release as an artifact named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}.
